sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71876" key="custrofu/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξυστρο-φύλαξ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[φῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n71876.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">box for keeping</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ξῦστραι</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.64</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
